jsonLd.title: Flipkart is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Flipkart. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About Flipkart:
Flipkart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart!
